name: Glen - Tidy Your Trash - Modular Apartment Makeover
author: Spuddeh
description:
Another attempt to tidy up the Glen apartment. The aim of this one wasn't to remove all the trash, but instead to make it look like V can walk to a bin every once in a while.

The mod also includes options to redecorate certain areas.

name: Corpo Plaza - Tidy Your Trash - Modular Apartment Makeover
author: Spuddeh
description: Future site of the Corpo Plaza apartment overhaul. (When Spuddeh stops getting distracted by Kao)

name: Northside - Tidy Your Trash - Modular Apartment Makeover
author: Spuddeh
description:
Another attempt to tidy up the Northside apartment. The aim of this one wasn't to remove all the trash, but instead to make it look like V can walk to a bin every once in a while. They've also gone out and bought some cleaning supplies and dusted the place.

The mod also includes options to redecorate.

name: Japantown - Tidy Your Trash - Modular Apartment Makeover
author: Spuddeh
description:
Another attempt to tidy up the Japantown apartment. The aim of this one wasn't to remove all the trash, but instead to make it look like V can walk to a bin every once in a while.

The mod also includes options to redecorate certain areas.

name: H10 - Tidy Your Trash - Modular Apartment Makeover
author: Spuddeh
description:
Another attempt to tidy up the H10 apartment. The aim of this one wasn't to remove all the trash, but instead to make it look like V can walk to a bin every once in a while.

The mod also includes options to redecorate, allowing you to redecorate only the areas you wish.

name: Dogtown - Tidy Your Trash - Modular Apartment Makeover
author: Spuddeh
description: Don't really have plans for this but needed an easily verifyable Dogtown location

name: Outdoor V - Canyon Camp
author: Kaoziun
description: Fully functional free outdoor apartment set inside a grotto. Shower under the waterfall and sleep in a bedroll. Includes Nibbles and Johnny integration. Packed with features and extensive in-game customization options, plus a pretty sweet secret area to discover.
